text:
tune :
Good aspects of paribhraman mars & Neptune gives benefic results with regards to the matters
pertaining to the houses of mars and also gets happiness from the person indicated by those
houses.
Bad aspects: Conflicts, problems, etc. from the places where bad aspects are formed. A strong
period of things unexpected & hence there is a caution to be careful. Fear of vices, taking
poisonous medicines and fatal consequences could be involved with a gang of cheats & conmen
and land into trouble & loss.
VI. Jupiter & other planets
Jupiter & Saturn :
God aspects: gets wealth, gains, success in services & business, success in studies, religious
conduct and religious awakening, performing good deeds & rites, developing homes & estate.
Bad aspects: Loss of wealth, problems with children and their failure, debt increases.
Jupiter & Hershel :
Good aspects: acquires authority, importance, wealth, gains, good benefits through services,
trade & business.
